action: From a selected pool, compare Exact selected pool and Best route modes for the same exact-input swap and inspect the bound route before review.
actor: Connected trader on the configured chain

expectedAssertions.statement: Exact selected pool mode quotes and executes only through the selected pair and bin step.
Best route mode may select another direct pool or multihop route only after that mode is explicitly chosen.
The quote and review explain the selected mode, every route hop, fees, price impact, and expected output.
The SDK quote, displayed amounts, protected minimum, and reviewed route agree deterministically.

negativePaths.trigger: A better alternate pool exists while Exact selected pool mode is active.
The best route changes from direct to multihop after a fresh quote.

prerequisites: At least two viable routes exist for the token pair.
One route uses the selected pool and another has a different pair or multiple hops.
recovery: Choose the intended routing mode explicitly.
Refresh the quote and complete a new review bound to the displayed route.
title: Bind swaps to explicit selected-pool or best-route mode

action: Approve the exact token amount for a reviewed swap, mutate market or wallet state before approval confirmation, and attempt to submit the pre-approval quote.
actor: Connected trader whose swap requires ERC-20 approval

expectedAssertions.statement: Approval confirmation invalidates the pre-approval quote and review.
A new generation obtains market snapshot, balance, allowance, and quote data newer than the approval receipt.
Submission remains disabled until the fresh quote and route are explicitly reviewed.
Slow or overlapping refresh completions cannot overwrite the newest generation-owned context.

negativePaths.trigger: Reserves, token identity, or quoted output change while the approval is pending.
An older post-approval refresh resolves after a newer retry.

prerequisites: Market, token, or quote state can be changed while approval is pending.
recovery: Wait for the newest refresh generation to complete.
Review the fresh allowance, route, quote, protected minimum, and gas before submitting.
title: Require a fresh swap quote after approval

action: Submit a swap, replace the pending transaction with the same nonce, reload the application, and reconcile the original and replacement receipts to the persisted intent.
actor: Connected trader with a submitted swap intent

expectedAssertions.statement: The reviewed owner, chain, deployment, pool, route, recipient, settings fingerprint, nonce, and original hash persist before and after reload.
A same-nonce replacement hash is attached to the same intent rather than creating a second swap intent.
Only the canonical replacement receipt may finalize the intent; the superseded hash is never shown as a separate success.
Monitoring resumes without another wallet prompt or nonce increment.

negativePaths.trigger: The wallet replaces a pending swap with a higher-fee transaction using the same nonce.
The application reloads while only the original hash is known locally.

prerequisites: A persistent transaction journal is available.
The test wallet can replace a pending same-nonce transaction.
recovery: Resume reconciliation from the persisted owner-scoped intent.
Follow the canonical same-nonce hash to its required confirmation threshold before allowing a new swap.
title: Reconcile swap transaction replacement across reload

action: Confirm a submitted swap, remove its receipt through a controlled reorg, reload during reconciliation, then re-include or replace the transaction.
actor: Connected trader with a previously confirming swap

expectedAssertions.statement: A receipt below the required confirmation threshold remains confirming rather than canonical success.
Receipt disappearance or block-hash change demotes the intent to orphaned or reconciling and never leaves it as success.
Reload preserves the same owner-scoped reviewed intent, nonce, and hash lineage during reorg reconciliation.
Success is restored only after a receipt in the canonical chain reaches the required confirmation threshold.

negativePaths.trigger: The confirming swap receipt is removed before reaching the confirmation threshold.
The application reloads while the original receipt is absent and the transaction is being re-included.

prerequisites: The environment can create a controlled chain reorg.
The transaction journal monitors canonical block hashes and confirmation depth.
recovery: Continue bounded reconciliation for the original nonce and hash lineage.
Finalize only the re-included or replacement receipt that becomes canonical.
title: Demote and recover a swap across reorg

action: Submit a swap through a transport that broadcasts but withholds the returned hash, then attempt an immediate retry while reconciling account nonce and pending or canonical transactions.
actor: Connected trader encountering an ambiguous wallet or RPC response

expectedAssertions.statement: The immutable reviewed swap intent is persisted before broadcast and enters unknown-submission reconciliation when no hash returns.
Retry is blocked while nonce and pending or canonical transaction checks cannot exclude an earlier broadcast.
A discovered transaction is attached to the existing intent using owner, chain, deployment, nonce, and intent fingerprint.
A retry becomes available only after reconciliation proves no matching transaction was broadcast, and it uses a fresh quote and review.

negativePaths.trigger: Broadcast succeeds but the provider returns a transport error before returning the transaction hash.
Nonce and transaction lookup remain temporarily unavailable or inconclusive.

prerequisites: The provider fixture can broadcast while suppressing the returned hash.
Account nonce and pending or canonical transaction lookup are available for reconciliation.
recovery: Reconcile the persisted intent against nonce and chain transactions.
If no broadcast is proven, refresh all execution state and require a new explicit review before retry.
title: Prevent blind swap retry after ambiguous broadcast

action: Open a pool-scoped swap, switch between Exact selected pool and Best route, refresh quotes, and inspect every identity presented through confirmation.
actor: Connected trader entering from a pool workspace

expectedAssertions.statement: Selected-pool identity and best-route identity remain distinct in controls, quote, review, journal intent, and receipt reconciliation.
Changing routing mode invalidates the previous quote and requires a fresh route calculation.
No refresh, approval, or route-ranking result silently changes the execution authority from the reviewed mode.
The final calldata route and journal fingerprint match the explicitly reviewed pool or hop sequence.

negativePaths.trigger: A route-ranking refresh finds a better alternate pool while Exact selected pool is reviewed.
The user changes from Exact selected pool to Best route after reviewing a quote.

prerequisites: A pool workspace and at least one alternate route are available.
Route identity is observable in quote, calldata, and journal intent.
recovery: Keep the prior mode blocked after any identity-affecting change.
Calculate and explicitly review a new quote for the intended mode.
title: Preserve explicit swap route identity end to end
